title: [AArch64][SME] Instcombine `llvm.aarch64.sme.in.streaming.mode()`
summary:
The generalization strategy transforms a specific SME intrinsic optimization into a reusable pattern by abstracting the logic into a dedicated function (`instCombineInStreamingMode`). Instead of hardcoding a single condition, it queries the function's SME attributes to determine the streaming state dynamically. This allows the same transformation to handle multiple scenarios: streaming interface/body (`hasStreamingInterfaceOrBody`) and non-streaming-compatible interfaces, folding the intrinsic to a constant `true` or `false` accordingly.

The approach is extensible—adding new SME attribute checks only requires updating the helper function, not the core intrinsic dispatch. Developers can apply this by isolating intrinsic-specific logic into separate functions, using target-specific metadata (like `SMEAttrs`) to drive decisions, and integrating them cleanly into the existing `instCombineIntrinsic` switch. This keeps optimizations modular and maintainable.
